# AI Coding Agent Skills

This project includes specialised skills for AI engineering workflows.

Start with `/ai-workflow` for any LLM feature, prompt change, RAG pipeline,
agent, evaluation harness, or serving layer.

Core skills:

- `/ai-workflow`
- `/llm-api`
- `/llm-prompts`
- `/llm-schemas`
- `/llm-testing`
- `/llm-evaluation`
- `/llm-safety`

Optional skills may also be present depending on Copier answers:

- `/llm-rag`
- `/marimo`
- `/streamlit`
